title: Module 4.5: Interstate Operations & Compliance Matrix
subtitle: Multi-State Navigation & Touring Guide
description: Master the complexities of multi-state laser operations with interactive compliance tools, the 'I'm Touring - What Do I Need?' guide, comprehensive state matrix, and automated checklist generation.
learning_objectives: Use the 'I'm Touring' interactive guide for quick compliance assessment
Calculate notification deadlines across multiple jurisdictions
Compare penalty structures and enforcement mechanisms
